rows.label: tev000395_MSG0001
rows.name: Well, if it isn't [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0002
rows.name: The view of NLA from here is incredible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0003
rows.name:
Humanity's newest city... It's a lot
to soak in. Isn't it impressive?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: tev000395_SEL0011
rows.name: Claim that NLA is quite the city.

rows.label: tev000395_JNK0020
rows.name: Disagree

rows.label: tev000395_SEL0021
rows.name:
Point out that it still
has a ways to go.

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0004
rows.name:
Or perhaps it's just a
testament to humanity's greed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0005
rows.name:
Can't argue there. Mankind's greed
is never truly sated, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0006
rows.name:
After the White Whale fell to
pieces from the sky, we used Miran
materials to build this city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0007
rows.name:
Even a world away, human behavior never
changes. We take what we need from the
world around us, and damn the consequences.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0008
rows.name:
I mean, look at us. We land on a pristine planet,
and what's the first thing we do? Claim it, colonize
it, and start eliminating the local wildlife.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0009
rows.name:
Look, don't get me wrong—I get why
some of these things are necessary.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0010
rows.name:
Most of the indigens would kill
us in a heartbeat, plus we have
the Growth to deal with.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0011
rows.name:
And yet, I sometimes wonder
if we should've just stayed
with Earth to the bitter end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0012
rows.name: Sorry, getting a little morose there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0013
rows.name:
Let's change the subject.
Heard any good scuttlebutt
from Elma or Vandham lately?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_JNK0030
rows.name: Decline

rows.label: tev000395_SEL0031
rows.name: Confess that nothing comes to mind.

rows.label: tev000395_JNK0040
rows.name: Comply

rows.label: tev000395_SEL0041
rows.name: Tell Lao a funny story about Tatsu.

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0014
rows.name: Nothing, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0015
rows.name:
Yeah, I guess there's no good
gossip on your floor of the Home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0016
rows.name:
With all the foot traffic in your area, people
probably end up going to places like the command
center in BLADE Tower when they want to talk.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0017
rows.name:
And I'm sure you're no more eager to
visit such places than I am. Heh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0018
rows.name:
Still, if you ever hear anything
especially juicy, let me know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0019
rows.name:
Hah! So THAT'S why Tatsu wasn't
eaten by the Bias? Seriously?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0020
rows.name:
I feel bad for the little spud,
but man, that is classic.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0021
rows.name:
He ate so much cranjelly, he got it all
over himself, then slipped out of those
Bias hands like a wet bar of soap...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0022
rows.name: Talk about dumb luck, yeesh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0023
rows.name:
And to think, if he hadn't crammed
his face full of cranjelly, he'd
have never met you and Lin.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0024
rows.name:
Ah, good times. But as amusing
a story as that was, it wasn't
exactly what I had in mind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0025
rows.name:
So if you hear anything else juicy,
let me know, yeah? And I'm not
talking about cranjelly juice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0026
rows.name:
Sometimes you gotta play the
angles to be an effective BLADE,
you know? Help each other out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0027
rows.name: Anyway, I'd better get back to work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000395_MSG0028
rows.name: Catch you later, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]
